description_long: This object appears to be a set of over-ear headphones with a modern, rounded design, resting on a circular base. The headphones feature large, cushioned ear cups in black and green, connected by a flexible headband. The base is flat and circular, likely serving as a charging dock or display stand, with a subtle cable or wire visible. The headphones have a sleek, plastic and metal construction, with visible padding for comfort. The overall design is compact and portable, suitable for personal audio use in urban environments. The color palette is dominated by black, green, and metallic accents, giving it a contemporary look.
description: A pair of modern over-ear headphones with black and green ear cups, resting on a circular base, likely a charging dock.
description_view_0: Headphones are clearly visible on the circular base, with the green and black ear cups and headband facing forward.
description_view_1: The base is most prominent, with the headphones partially obscured behind the large gray oval.
description_view_2: The blue oval dominates the view, partially blocking the headphones and base from sight.
description_view_3: The headphones and base are visible from the side, with the blue oval in the foreground and the gray oval behind.
